text:
RepoPulse forecast (7-day breakout watchlist)

Method: reproducible baseline model using public GitHub signals (no LLM).
Breakout = +max(200 stars, +50%) within 7 days.

1) zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw | 97% | stars now 17326 → est 34087 (range 34018-34156)
   https://github.com/zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw
2) ShinMegamiBoson/OpenPlanter | 93% | stars now 1106 → est 4273 (range 4248-4298)
   https://github.com/ShinMegamiBoson/OpenPlanter
3) HKUDS/ClawWork | 93% | stars now 5177 → est 11586 (range 11539-11633)
   https://github.com/HKUDS/ClawWork
4) AlexsJones/llmfit | 93% | stars now 2951 → est 6594 (range 6567-6621)
   https://github.com/AlexsJones/llmfit
5) nullclaw/nullclaw | 92% | stars now 1785 → est 4397 (range 4372-4422)
   https://github.com/nullclaw/nullclaw

Daily forecasts are logged publicly, then scored 7 days later (hits, misses, calibration).
#opensource #software #datascience #forecasting #github
